# OpenCrux Repo Instructions

- Keep the first slice local-first and deterministic.
- Prefer explainable heuristics over opaque scoring models.
- Treat unsupported footage conditions as first-class product behavior with explicit warnings.
- Keep climbing scope on recorded single-climber bouldering or board footage until verification proves expansion is warranted.
- Avoid introducing a separate frontend toolchain unless the current static UI blocks product learning.
- Preserve the workflow boundary: discovery, implementation, verification, review.
- When changing analysis heuristics, update tests and the milestone document together.
